dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3484 IS: To amend section 3634 of title 18, United States Code, to extend the period for First Step Act reports.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin (for himself and Mr. Grassley) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend section 3634 of title 18, United States Code, to extend the period for First Step Act reports.

section.text: Section 3634 of title 18, United States Code, is amended, in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking 5 years and inserting 10 years.
